This page is part of the 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline for Prescribing Opioids Implementation Guide (v2022.1.0: Release) based on FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) R4. This is the current published version in its permanent home (it will always be available at this URL). For a full list of available versions, see the Directory of published versions

  • XML
  • JSON
  • TTL

ValueSet: Conditions likely terminal for opioid prescribing

Official URL: http://fhir.org/guides/cdc/opioid-cds/ValueSet/conditions-likely-terminal-for-opioid-prescribing Version: 2022.1.0
Active as of 2023-05-25 Computable Name: CONDITIONS_LIKELY_TERMINAL_FOR_OPIOID_PRESCRIBING

Copyright/Legal: © CDC 2016+.

Conditions that generally are thought to have terminal prognosis

Conditions for exclusions in 2022 CDC Clinical Practice Guideline

References

This value set is not used here; it may be used elsewhere (e.g. specifications and/or implementations that use this content)

Logical Definition (CLD)

Profiles: CPGComputableValueSet, CPGExecutableValueSet

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept descends from Section-C76-C80 (Malignant neoplasms of ill-defined, other secondary and unspecified sites (C76-C80))
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a C25 (Malignant neoplasm of pancreas)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a K70.4 (Alcoholic hepatic failure)
  • Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a K72 (Hepatic failure, not elsewhere classified)
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version 📍http://snomed.info/sct/731000124108 where concept is-a 128462008 (Metastatic neoplasm (disease))
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version 📍http://snomed.info/sct/731000124108 where concept is-a 363418001 (Malignant tumour of pancreas)
  • Include codes fromhttp://snomed.info/sct version 📍http://snomed.info/sct/731000124108 where concept is-a 59927004 (Hepatic failure)

 

Expansion

This value set expansion contains 991 concepts.

Explanation of the columns that may appear on this page:

Level A few code lists that FHIR defines are hierarchical - each code is assigned a level. In this scheme, some codes are under other codes, and imply that the code they are under also applies
System The source of the definition of the code (when the value set draws in codes defined elsewhere)
Code The code (used as the code in the resource instance)
Display The display (used in the display element of a Coding). If there is no display, implementers should not simply display the code, but map the concept into their application
Definition An explanation of the meaning of the concept
Comments Additional notes about how to use the code
